items.title: Dorian Finney-Smith will go into the Hornets NTMLE (used as a trade exception).
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Dorian Finney-Smith will go into the Hornets NTMLE (used as a trade exception).

Charlotte is still well under the luxury tax at about $32M or so.

Houston will drop to about $3.6M under the tax, $12.2M under the first apron and $24.9M under the second apron. Three open roster spots.

items.title: The Houston Rockets are trading Dorian Finney-Smith and three second-round picks to the Charlotte Hornets, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Houston Rockets are trading Dorian Finney-Smith and three second-round picks to the Charlotte Hornets, sources tell ESPN.
